title: Citrus Sunrise Portuguese Custard Tarts
description: A brunch recipe inspired by traditional Portuguese custard tarts, with a twist of citrusy flavor.
instructions: In a medium bowl, whisk together the flour, confectioners' sugar, and lemon zest.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the lemon juice and eggs.
Add the granulated sugar and melted butter to the lemon juice mixture, whisking until smooth.
Add the flour mixture to the lemon mixture and stir until just combined.
Roll out the dough on a lightly floured surface to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
Cut out circles of dough using a cookie cutter or the rim of a glass.
Spoon a small amount of the lemon mixture onto one half of each dough circle.
Fold the dough in half to enclose the filling and press the edges to seal.
Brush the tops with a little bit of milk or beaten egg for a glaze.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown.
Allow the tarts to cool on a wire rack before serving.
